if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND p.area_id = #{areaId} AND p.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpAreaPanel :: selectById */ p.* , are.area_nm AS area_nm , pan.panel_nm AS panel_nm FROM dp_area_panel p LEFT JOIN dp_area are ON are.area_id = p.area_id LEFT JOIN dp_panel pan ON pan.panel_id = p.panel_id WHERE p.area_panel_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpAreaPanel :: selectList */ p.* , are.area_nm AS area_nm , pan.panel_nm AS panel_nm FROM dp_area_panel p LEFT JOIN dp_area are ON are.area_id = p.area_id LEFT JOIN dp_panel pan ON pan.panel_id = p.panel_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpAreaPanel :: selectPageList */ p.* , are.area_nm AS area_nm , pan.panel_nm AS panel_nm FROM dp_area_panel p LEFT JOIN dp_area are ON are.area_id = p.area_id LEFT JOIN dp_panel pan ON pan.panel_id = p.panel_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(p.*) /* base.ec.dp :: DpAreaPanel :: selectPageCount */ FROM dp_area_panel p
